reviews.review_description: The most immersive space game for me, feels like you are there. Both graphics and sound are awesome. Idea with the back cannon is great as are the controls when you got used to them after a while. Fat recommendation.

reviews.review_title: Controls do not work on the Go
reviews.review_description: If anyone can get this to work on the Go, and can put me right, I will change my review. The only way I can get anything to work is by holding the Go controller in one hand and gamepad in the other. I reached out to the developers before posting this review, to ask them what the controls are on the Go, but all I got back was an automated response saying that they were a small studio, and not answering my question. Until I hear otherwise, stay clear of this title on the Go.

Wasn't sure about this because it is in cardboard too, but it delivered. Geat graphics, fun ship, good controls, nice voice acting, cool ship upgrades.  It has a lot of things that other ship games in GearVR dont.

No sound issues so far on S6 like others said they had, I do need my cooling fan or its 1 mission, need to stop. Fairly typical.

reviews.review_title: Allow me to invert the Y axis
reviews.review_description: The game looks good but I need to be able to invert the Y axis... if I'm looking up and pull back on the stick I want the nose of my fighter to come up to meet my gaze.  Make this happen and it could be a 5 star game.

developer_response.body: You can invert the Y axis of the controller in the settings menu.

reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome, graphics are beautiful, its got a good story and it does some things that End Space does not do that sets it apart and makes it worth the money. This is a fantastic game, keep up the good work!!!!

Played on S8+
Best space game I've played so far. But story a little bit short..

Please add gamepad support. Other than that, good job devs. Nice graphics,  gameplay, even a nice story. Only thing keeping this from 5* is some awkwardness using the motion controller. UPDATE: THANKS FOR ADDING CONTROLLER SUPPORT!

    Oh yeah.....I won this game watching the YouTube channel VR Girl. She reviews Gear Vr games, check her out. She should have more subscribers.

As a VR game on a mobile platform it is very engaging. The controls, once you have mastered them, are very good and it becomes very intuitive. The graphics are smooth and rich. I'm glad I bought the game and really enjoying it.
Love this game great controls with the oculus controller,Graphics are great and not a half bad story
Has great graphics. Test flight started ok but controls continue to lock. Can not figure how to unlovk controls. Never got pass the test flight.

developer_response.body: We haven't found any issues with controls, please tell us more to do a quick fix. Are you playing with any controller? In every case, at the beginning you need to look forward, in front of the ship, the blue circle's center. What is the mission objective displayed at left top corner? Please send us more information at: helphng@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: Controls would lock permanently mid play buggy setup

reviews.review_title: Way to ruine a great game
reviews.review_description: Just get the cardboard version no flight game should not have gamepad support c'mon I feel completely  ripped off  using the go controller  just plain sucks no excuse do not  waste your money
My version does not have the multi game pad options like to change pitch yawn reverse a video called 'vr shop shows a lot of options for controller

I take it back!. I love this game just as much as End Space. Very immersive, great graphics. Love the different missions and the story line adds a more interesting edge to it.  It's more than a game, it's an experience!. So worth the money

Great looking game very impressive!!!but so annoying concerning controllers...gamepad does not work the game by themselves ....even in the tutorial you have to use controller and gamepad to play.... so it has been for me ...with me trying two different gamepad.   Had to restart game and just used go controller everything works okay,but proper control with a gamepad would be magic...or is there a gamepad that the devs know of that works this game.????
ever since I was a little kid I wanted to fly a spaceship and that's probably about the closest I've ever been to it really cool game once you get used to the controls you're an  A1 pilot
I quite enjoyed playing this game however I wish using a gamepad was an option.

developer_response.body: Here you go! We've added gamepad to supported controllers.

reviews.review_description: One of my favorites

This gameoad support is broken. If you have a controller synced to the Oculus Go that is on the controls don't register. It works ok if you only use the Go controller, but the shouldn't advertise gamepad support
Facile à manœuvrer avec oculus go.  Pouvez-vous en créer d'autre dans le même style.  Merci!
